commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh 1 Chronicles 6:60 And out of the tribe of Benjamin; Geba with its pasture lands, and Alemeth with its pasture lands, and Anathoth with its pasture lands. All their cities throughout their families were thirteen cities. Josue, Almon. Thirteen; but Geta and Gabaon are not here expressed, Josue xxi. (Calmet) Alexandrian Septuagint inserts, "Labee "before, and "Anchos, with its suburbs "after Ana Thoth, thus making 14; but these additional cities were not sacerdotal.
